title: Permission to Maim
description: A small mod that adds the option to configure the visibility of body parts.
body:
# Permission to Maim

A small mod that adds body part toggles to the in-game "Skin Customization" menu, intended to be used for roleplaying purposes (or just to be silly :3).

## Mod Features

Permission to Maim can be installed on the client, the server, or both:

### Client-side features:
- Ability to hide body parts (and actually see when they are hidden).
  - Only visible to you, unless the mod is also installed server-side.
- Option to hide any pieces of armor that would be left floating (on by default).
  - This only partially removes parts of armor when possible. For example, if you disable your right arm, only the right arm piece of a chestplate will be hidden.
- Option to disable the mod's rendering, useful for preventing players that hide all of their body parts from being invisible.

### Server-side features:
- Visibility synchronization between all clients with Permission to Maim installed.
  - Other players with the mod installed will see when your body parts are hidden.
  - Vanilla clients are completely unaffected.
